coachAM: Your inconsistent Sleep Protocol and Training aren't isolated failures; they're direct symptoms of a fragmented self-perception, evident in your journal's repeated struggle with "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" and the aspiration to be a "lock in young with a clear" identity, yet lacking the discipline to embody it consistently. This pervasive lack of internal discipline, the inability to bridge the gap between your declared intentions ("best worker, best seller, charismatic with disciplina and efficiency") and daily execution, is the root cause eroding your physical foundation and, consequently, your capacity for sustained elite performance and spiritual alignment. Today, before any other input, block out your calendar for a non-negotiable 30-minute evening review to capture actual outcomes and align them with your morning intentions.
